name: Three-Rice Party Salad (with Easy Variation)
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups long-grain brown rice, cooked
1 ½ cups long-grain white rice, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the three types of rice separately according to package directions.
2. When finished cooking, mix all the rices together in a large shallow dish and let cool.
3. Whisk together the mustard powder, lemon juice, and walnut oil. Stir this mixture into the cooled rice with the shallots and herbs.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve cold.
EASY Variation – Purchase a mixed rice package that includes a “fine herb” seasoning packet and lower salt content. Cook according to package directions, then let cool.
6. Drizzle with a commercially blended lemon‑mustard Caesar dressing and refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Top the salad with chopped roasted walnuts or pecans and fresh parsley (roast chopped nuts in a dry wok over moderately high heat, stirring frequently until aromatic, then remove and cool before using).
